---
title: Extras
---

The following pages are referenced and linked throughout the main guide. We collect them here to make them easier to find:

- [Install git](install-git.qmd)
- [Writing commit messages](writing-commit-messages.qmd)
- [Administering GitLab Groups and GitHub Organizations](admin-git-groups.qmd)
- [GitHub flow demo using the command line](githubflow-demo-cli.qmd)
- [Virtual environments in Python](pipenv.qmd)
